since_last: 67% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.95%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC -0.19% · Gold -0.85% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 67% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.95%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.95%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.30%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +4.62%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +4.62%, ARM +4.47%, QCOM +3.29%, LSCC +3.04%, EQIX +2.82%. Laggards: NOW -1.49%, SAP -1.45%, BIDU -1.25%, FTNT -0.95%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.10% at $156.26
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.10% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
